calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Salciedo, #2031.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Casey Lane Conrad.
Default was entered against defendant on October 22, 2009
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 22, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Casey Lane Conrad as follows:

Damages/Principal - $74,832.97.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,270.50.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $699.45, for a total judgment in the amount of $88,302.92.

Additionally, it is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph three of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
